title: December 24
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|December}}
'''December 24''' is the 358th day (359th in leap years) of the year. There are 7 days remaining.
</noinclude>
*[[1997]] – [[The Last Command 2|''The Last Command'' 2]] published.
*[[2003]] – [[Empire 15|''Empire'' 15]] published.
*2003 – ''[[Star Wars Tales 18]]'' published.
*[[2008]] – [[Knights of the Old Republic 36|''Knights of the Old Republic'' 36]] published.
*[[2013]] – ''[[Star Wars Omnibus: Knights of the Old Republic Volume 2]]'' published.
*[[2018]] – ''[[Star Wars Resistance]]'' shorts "[[Unmotivated]]" and "[[The Need for Speed]]" released on [[Wikipedia:YouTube|YouTube]].
*2018 – ''[[Star Wars Vol. 9: Hope Dies]]'' published.
*2018 – [[Solo: A Star Wars Story (Golden Book)|''Solo: A Star Wars Story'' (Golden Book)]] published.
*[[2019]] – [[Star Wars Insider 194|''Star Wars Insider'' 194]] published.
*[[2021]] – [[Anthony May]] dies.
*[[2024]] – "[[You Have a Lot to Learn About Pirates]]" aired on Disney+.
*2024 – [[Star Wars: Darth Vader – Black, White & Red|''Star Wars: Darth Vader – Black, White & Red'' trade paperback]] published.
*[[2025]] – [[Star Wars (2025) 8|''Star Wars'' (2025) 8]] published.
